programme.title: Faraar Kab Tak
programme.desc: The Horrifying Fact That Millions Of Unidentified Criminals Are Absconding Across The Nation, Is Enough To Frighten Anyone! The Show Is A Clutter Breaking Factual Crime Drama Series That Appeals To The Inherent Security Concern Of A Family. Engaging Police Procedure On True Crime Cases Is Brought To Life With An Edge Of Seat Narrative.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Stories By Rabindranath Tagore
programme.desc: The Characters Of Tagore'S Stories Spring Into Life Through The Cinematic Imagination Of Acclaimed Filmmaker, Anurag Basu In ‘Stories By Rabindranath Tagore'.Tagore'S Words And Basu'S Vision Have Amalgamated Into A Show That Transports You Back In Time To A World As Complicated As This One But With Far More Appeal And Beauty.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: F6_4173_Bangkok_Fight_Night_S2_Fight10a

Don't miss the "Science of the Eight Limbs" direct from Thailand!

programme.title: F6_DCS_19___Chase_vs_Roberts
programme.desc: Dynasty Combat Sports is Nebraska's largest and most active Mixed Martial Arts Company and will hold its 94th event over the past 7 years. UFC fighters such as Darrick Minner, Jason Brilz, Ryan Jensen and Grant Dawson had all competed in the DC Cage.

programme.title: B7THH_ep02
programme.desc: Launched in 2010 as a brand new boxing platform for British based boxers to compete on, the Queensbury Boxing League has firmly established itself as one of the UK's most exciting boxing competitions. Divided into nine separate weight categories and five skill levels, boxers battle it out over three, four and five two minute rounds against opponents of equal skill and ability in their respective weight classes and move up and down the rankings depending on their results. The most successful competitors will earn the right to challenge for one of the five separate titles in each weight division starting with the novice title and moving all the way up to the coveted Queensbury British title for the most skillful. The action is fast, exciting and competitive, with the UK's premier boxing league continuing to give boxing fans the most entertaining nights of action in the country.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: With base camp set up and the cold setting in, Chris and Casey must find food…fast. Their energy levels are depleting as they begin their hunt for moose. As time ticks on, the brothers must think on their feet to find food…or risk going hungry.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: Saskatchewan's bitter cold and unforgiving wind makes for brutal days and nights for Chris and Casey. A rainstorm adds more difficulty and discomfort. Mentally drained and hungry, the brothers must try new tactics to find food and warmth.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: The lack of hunting opportunities have drained Chris and Casey's patience. Arguments ensue when they disagree over staying put, or portaging to a new lake. Signs of a bear remind the brothers that they must remain focused in order to stay alive.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: Symptoms of starvation have set in for Chris and Casey, who haven't eaten in days. When they cross paths with a grouse, the unexpected happens. Frustration peaks as the temperatures drop. The brothers set up a new camp, but will it help the hunt?

programme.title: Basilicata
programme.desc: Charming host Chef Michael Bonacini explores the mountainous region of Basilicata with a feast fit for any celebration. Beginning with an antipasto that caters to the region's southern heat, Michael stuffs crunchy sweet peppers with ripe tomatoes, savoury anchovies, and fresh oregano. Moving on to the primo, Michael cooks up a creamy Vermicelli Frittata. Using leftover pasta, he combines eggs with cheese, anchovies, and chili flakes for extra flavour to make a classic Basilicata dish. Michael cooks up Pollo Alla Potentina, a traditional meal from the Feast of Saint Gerard. This hearty chicken stew is sure to heat up your core, using hot peppers as the base of the meal. For his final dish, Michael combines the rich tastes of pomegranate, walnuts, and dark chocolate to create his unique Sweet Wheat Bowl.

programme.title: Cucumber Salad, Chicken, Noodles and Fritters

programme.desc: Stephanie Izard meets multi-gen families taking mom's recipes and turning them into smash hit food business.

programme.title: Preza Castle & the Xhamia Preze Mosque, Albania
programme.desc: Preza is one of the most scenic areas of the valley of Tirana. While the Castle has inspired countless stories and legends, its own history will always be dominated by the golden era of the national hero Skanderbeg's resistance against the Ottomans.

programme.title: Andros Town, Andros Island, Cyclades, Greece
programme.desc: Discover Andros Town, the capital of Andros' Island… A city with a significant century-long history, with monuments, churches, and ruins scattered all over the streets, witnessing its long cultural heritage. Andros Town is nothing like a Cycladic capital.

programme.title: Ethno Village-Museum Ljubacke Doline, Bosnia & Herzegovina
programme.desc: Exploring different cultures and experiencing lives utterly different from yours is the best part of discovering new horizons. This kind of experience can be done in one particular place in Bosnia & Herzegovina called Ljubacke Doline. Well, you can transl"&"ate it literally by Kisses Valley. This place is one of the many Ethno villages in the region.

programme.title: Plovdiv, The city on seven hills, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Few places have a history like Plovdiv. Its hilly landscape bears the marks of many great civilizations – from the mysterious Thracian tribes, to ancient Greece and Persia, to the Roman Empire, all the way to the Bulgarian Empire, the Ottomans and even Ts"&"arist Russia. In fact, Plovdiv is one of the oldest cities in Europe.

programme.title: Stamboli's Countryhouse, Crimea
programme.desc: Stamboli Villa is the most beautiful building in the city of Feodosia, located in the Crimean peninsula. It was built from 1909 to 1914. According to the legend, its creator was the leader of the Vienna secession, Otto Wagner. The cottage in Moorish style"&" was built on the order of tobacco manufacturer Josef Stamboli.

programme.title: Fengguo Monastery, China
programme.desc: A royal temple, witness of the Liao Dynasty in China: the Fengguo temple. It is a Buddhist temple possessing profound historical, artistic, scientific and social values. It contains the only extant and tallest wooden structured Buddha pagoda in China.

programme.title: Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris. These ancient city walls are some of the best-preserved in the country.

programme.title: In Alberobello Trulli, Italy
programme.desc: Alberobello is a village in Puglia where ancient traditions still characterize an entire community to this day. Perhaps the masterpiece of Puglia is Alberobello itself. No tourist manual ignores it. Every geography book for middle schools carries a photograph of its Trulli. Alberobello is a perfect village whose formula has become a style in the rigor with which it has been applied.

programme.title: Orhei Vechi Monastery, Moldova
programme.desc: Old Orhei is a Moldovan historical and archaeological complex located in Trebujeni, which is approximately 60 kilometres (37 mi) north-east of Chişinău on the Răut River in the Republic of Moldova. The ancient city of Orheiul Vechi is a natural and historical complex, located in a narrow bend of the Raut River. The natural landscape of limestone rock, eroded by the river, is combined with archaeological vestiges of the ancient Trypillian civilization. The Orthodox monastery is still inhabited by a handful of Orthodox monks, who maintain the church at the top of the hill. The caves are still functional as chapels. The caves contain an array of historical artifacts.

programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara. First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Fantast Castle & Bechej town, Serbia
programme.desc: Beautiful Serbia: it is a multicultural country with a lot of fascinating places to discover. Though it is a small state, it still has one of the most significant Slavic cultural heritages in the world. Today we will travel to the pearl of Serbian lands: "&"Fantast castle and the nearby city of Becej.

programme.title: Atzara Old Town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: Atzara is a comune in the Province of Nuoro in the Italian region Sardinia, located about 90 kilometres north of Cagliari and about 45 kilometres southwest of Nuoro. Located in Barbagia, the original village date back to the years around 1000 and develope"&"d near the spring of Bingia de giosso, still existing.

programme.title: Arnad town, Aosta Valley, Italy
programme.desc: Arnad town in Aosta Valley is known for the production of the D.O.C Montjovet wine. The small medieval village stands on the banks of the Dora Baltea. It is situated on the banks of the Dora Baltea. Arnad has its roots in tradition: from rock climbing a"&"mong the most famous Alps to the walks in the woods of chestnut or between churches and castles, testimonies of a great past. Nature, sport, history, genuine flavors, relaxation.

programme.title: In Alberobello Trulli, Italy
programme.desc: Alberobello is a village in Puglia where ancient traditions still characterize an entire community to this day. Perhaps the masterpiece of Puglia is Alberobello itself. No tourist manual ignores it. Every geography book for middle schools carries a photog"&"raph of its Trulli. Alberobello is a perfect village whose formula has become a style in the rigor with which it has been applied.

programme.title: Tabatabaei Natanzi Historical House, Iran
programme.desc: The ancient city of Kashan is located in the northern part of the Isfahan province in Iran. Throughout Persian history, Kashan has always been the core of ceramics, lustreware, knitting, and weaving, producing decorated pottery, glazed tiles, and finest w"&"ool and silk carpets. This is one of them, built by Seyed Jafar Tabatabaee, during the Qajar dynasty: The Tabatabaei Historical House...

programme.title: Herodion National Park, Israel
programme.desc: Herodion, one of Herod the Great's most ambitious building projects, served the Judean King as summer palace, fortress, monument, burial ground and district capital. Of all the sites built by the ""builder-king"", Herodion is the only one that bears his n"&"ame.The immense Herodion complex, fifteen kilometers south of Jerusalem and about five kilometers south-east of Bethlehem, near the ancient roads to the dead Sea, was built between 23 and 20 B.C.E. It was divided into two sections: Upper Herodion, which c"&"ontained the palace set within a circular fortress on an artificial cone-shaped mountain and Lower Herodion, at the base of the mountain, which consisted of numerous palace annexes for use by the king's family and friends, and for the central offices of "&"the district capital.

programme.title: Banias Spring, Israel
programme.desc: Located at the foot of Mount Hermon, north of the Golan Heights, we can find a spring. This spring is the Banias River source, one of the main tributaries of the Jordan River. Here, archaeologists uncovered a shrine dedicated to Pan and related deities. L"&"et find out about the remains of an ancient city founded sometime after Alexander the Great's conquest.
